channel.title: Git-Based on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Git-Based on Pi Stack

item.title: Decap CMS vs TinaCMS vs Sveltia CMS: Best Git-Based CMS 2026
item.description: Managing content for static websites used to mean choosing between editing raw Markdown files by hand or adopting a heavy database-driven platform like WordPress. Git-based CMS tools solve this problem by providing a friendly editing interface while storing all content directly in your Git repository — no database required.
